results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

test_cases.title: Create new customer record with valid data
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system allows creation of a new customer record when provided with a valid name, email, and phone number.
test_cases.technique_used: Functional testing of the create operation
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Execute the create operation with a valid name, email, and phone number.
steps.expected_result: The system creates the customer record and returns a confirmation of successful creation.

test_cases.expected_result: The customer record is created and a success confirmation is returned.
assumptions: Valid name, email, and phone number values are configured for the test.

traceability.coverage_item: Create a new customer record with valid name, email, and phone number
traceability.technique_used: Functional testing of the create operation

source_basis: allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Create a new customer record with valid name, email, and phone number
coverage_items.technique_used: Functional testing of the create operation
coverage_items.rationale: Verifies the core functionality described in the requirement
source_basis: allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number

results.requirement_text: The system shall display a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first.

test_cases.title: Display active projects sorted by recent update
test_cases.objective: Confirm that the system shows only active projects and orders them by most recent update timestamp descending.
test_cases.technique_used: UI inspection and data ordering verification
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Inspect the list of projects presented by the system.
steps.expected_result: The list contains only active projects and they are ordered by most recent update timestamp descending.

test_cases.expected_result: The system displays only active projects, ordered by most recent update timestamp descending.
assumptions: Assume that there exist active projects with distinct last update timestamps.

traceability.coverage_item: Verify that the UI displays only active projects and that they are ordered by most recent update timestamp descending
traceability.technique_used: UI inspection and data ordering verification

source_basis: display a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first

plans.requirement_text: The system shall display a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Verify that the UI displays only active projects and that they are ordered by most recent update timestamp descending
coverage_items.technique_used: UI inspection and data ordering verification
coverage_items.rationale: Ensures core functional behavior of listing and correct sorting
source_basis: display a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first

results.requirement_text: The system shall let a user update the status of a task from open to completed.

test_cases.title: Update task status from open to completed
test_cases.objective: Verify that a user can change a task status from open to completed.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Update the task status from open to completed using the system's provided mechanism.
steps.expected_result: The task status is changed to completed.

test_cases.expected_result: Task status is updated to completed.
assumptions: Assume that a task currently in 'open' status exists and the user has the ability to update its status.

traceability.coverage_item: Update task status from open to completed

source_basis: update the status of a task from open to completed

plans.requirement_text: The system shall let a user update the status of a task from open to completed.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Update task status from open to completed
coverage_items.rationale: Verify that a user can successfully change a task's status from open to completed as specified.
source_basis: update the status of a task from open to completed

results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

test_cases.title: Search order by valid order number
test_cases.objective: Verify that searching with a valid order number returns the correct order details.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Perform a search for an order using a valid order number.
steps.expected_result: The system returns the details of the matching order.

assumptions: Assume that orders exist in the system and the search functionality is accessible.

traceability.coverage_item: Search for an existing order using a valid order number returns the correct order details.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Search for an existing order using a valid order number returns the correct order details.
coverage_items.rationale: Verifies the core functionality described in the requirement.

results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

test_cases.title: Manager assigns an employee to a department
test_cases.objective: Verify that a manager can assign an employee to a department as specified.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Execute the assignment operation to associate the employee with the department by the manager.
steps.expected_result: The employee becomes associated with the department.

test_cases.expected_result: The employee is successfully assigned to the department.
assumptions: The employee and department records exist in the system

traceability.coverage_item: Manager can assign an employee to a department

source_basis: allow a manager to assign an employee to a department

assumptions: The employee and department records exist in the system
warnings: Reviewer unavailable; generated cases require human review

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Manager can assign an employee to a department
coverage_items.rationale: Core functionality required for organizational management
source_basis: allow a manager to assign an employee to a department
